name: Gideon Steelforge
sd_appearance: A towering, battle-scarred Warforged with rust-streaked plate armor and a longsword at his hip stands sentinel, his gaze scanning the chaotic Undercity. His eyes—a cold, unyielding metallic blue—reflect the dim light of the city, revealing no emotion. A heavy crossbow rests on his shoulders, the Tower Authority insignia glinting on his breastplate. A distinctive mechanical halo adorns his head, a testament to his senior rank within the Tower Authority. His height, even among his kind, commands attention, a silent reminder of his role in maintaining order within the city's dark heart.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: armour maintained to standard, rank markings clearly displayed
